title: dianthus laricifolius subsp. laricifolius
intro: Dianthus laricifolius subsp. laricifolius, also known as the fringed pink or mountain pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, coughs, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dianthus laricifolius subsp. laricifolius include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Dianthus laricifolius subsp. laricifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
